entity.summary: Avalanche decentralized exchange surfaced through the PumpSpace application, with current spot markets and substantial recent reported trading volume.
entity.notes: The first-party JavaScript application remains reachable. Current CoinGecko exchange data preserves 11 listed coins, 30 pairs, recently updated markets, and substantial 24-hour trading volume. HEI retains AquaSpace V3 as the canonical exchange identity and PumpSpace as an alias and application brand.

evidence.title: PumpSpace official application
evidence.notes: The current first-party JavaScript application remains reachable and is the trading destination linked from the AquaSpace V3 exchange profile.

evidence.title: AquaSpace V3 exchange profile
evidence.notes: Current exchange data reports recently updated Avalanche spot markets, 11 coins, 30 pairs, and substantial 24-hour volume.

evidence.title: AquaSpace V3 exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Exchange discovery data preserves the AquaSpace V3 identity, API ID, and pumpspace.io application domain.
